Adding a New Blog Post

Follow these 3 steps every time you want to publish a new article. No coding needed.

01 Create a .md file Go to src/content/blog/ and create a new file like my-post-title.md
02 Add the header info Copy the top section from sample-post.md and update title, date, category and description.
03 Write your content Write below the --- line using normal text. Use ## for headings and ** for bold. Save and it appears automatically.
Zad Global Trade

Exporting India's premium agricultural heritage to the global stage with integrity, quality, and precision.
